evidenceDetail.text: QUERY EVIDENCE 4 metadata rows returned x STATEMENT 01F1469A-13EB-1DDE-AEDD-E93757848D98 WITH exec_dash_assets AS ( SELECT asset_fqn, domain, data_product, criticality, certification, is_critical, is_certified, owner_count, open_work_count, last_altered FROM `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_assets_current` WHERE table_name ILIKE '%executive%' OR table_name ILIKE '%dashboard%' OR data_product ILIKE '%executive%' OR data_product ILIKE '%dashboard%' OR asset_fqn ILIKE '%executive%' OR asset_fqn ILIKE '%dashboard%' ) SELECT a.asset_fqn, a.domain, a.data_product, a.criticality, a.certification, a.is_critical, a.is_certified, a.owner_count, a.open_work_count, a.last_altered, CASE WHEN w.work_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'open_governance_work' END AS risk_type, CASE WHEN q.result_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'quality_issue' END AS risk_type_detail, w.status AS work_status, w.created_at AS work_created_at, q.outcome AS quality_outcome, q.severity AS quality_severity, q.executed_at AS quality_executed_at FROM exec_dash_assets a LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_governance_work_current` w ON a.asset_fqn = w.asset_fqn AND lower(COALESCE(w.status, '')) IN ('pending', 'open') AND w.created_at >= DATE_TRUN

evidenceDetail.text: QUERY EVIDENCE 4 metadata rows returned x STATEMENT 01F1469A-13EB-1DDE-AEDD-E93757848D98 WITH exec_dash_assets AS ( SELECT asset_fqn, domain, data_product, criticality, certification, is_critical, is_certified, owner_count, open_work_count, last_altered FROM `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_assets_current` WHERE table_name ILIKE '%executive%' OR table_name ILIKE '%dashboard%' OR data_product ILIKE '%executive%' OR data_product ILIKE '%dashboard%' OR asset_fqn ILIKE '%executive%' OR asset_fqn ILIKE '%dashboard%' ) SELECT a.asset_fqn, a.domain, a.data_product, a.criticality, a.certification, a.is_critical, a.is_certified, a.owner_count, a.open_work_count, a.last_altered, CASE WHEN w.work_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'open_governance_work' END AS risk_type, CASE WHEN q.result_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'quality_issue' END AS risk_type_detail, w.status AS work_status, w.created_at AS work_created_at, q.outcome AS quality_outcome, q.severity AS quality_severity, q.executed_at AS quality_executed_at FROM exec_dash_assets a LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_governance_work_current` w ON a.asset_fqn = w.asset_fqn AND lower(COALESCE(w.status, '')) IN ('pending', 'open') AND w.created_at >= DATE_TRUN

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › Dev ⌘K UC connected · 64.9% coverage Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope, Governance Atlas sco

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › Dev ⌘K UC connected · 0% coverage Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope, Governance Atlas scopes

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › Dev ⌘K UC connected · 0% coverage Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope, Governance Atlas scopes

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › Dev ⌘K UC connected · 64.9% coverage Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope, Governance Atlas sco

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › Dev ⌘K UC connected · 0% coverage Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope, Governance Atlas scopes

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › Dev ⌘K UC connected · 0% coverage Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope, Governance Atlas scopes
